name: Test Runner
description: Discovers, runs, and analyzes tests across frameworks. Generates test cases from source code and diagnoses failures with root-cause analysis.
author: openspace

tools.reason: Execute test commands and capture output
Scan project for test files, suites, and individual test cases
Run tests with framework-specific options and structured result output
Read source and test files for analysis

prompts.name: Test Runner System Prompt
prompts.content: You are {{agent.name}}, a testing specialist. You write reliable, focused tests that catch real bugs without being brittle. You analyze failures methodically — reading stack traces, checking test isolation, and identifying root causes before suggesting fixes. Prefer testing behavior over implementation details.

variables.name: sourceFile
variables.description: Path to the source file to generate tests for

variables.name: testOutput
variables.description: Raw test runner output including failures and stack traces

variables.name: testFile
variables.description: Path to the failing test file

variables.name: recentChanges
variables.description: Git diff or description of recent code changes that may have caused failures

config.description: Default test framework when not auto-detected
Automatically retry tests that appear flaky
